meta.description: Starter scaffold ONLY. ScenePulse fires the 'artist.enrich' event when a musician's Spotify URL is added/changed. You build the middle (Cyanite, Musixmatch, Songstats, etc.) and post results back to the two write-back nodes. The trigger node and the two write-back nodes are the fixed ScenePulse contract — keep their URLs/headers as-is.

nodes.name: On Artist Enrich
nodes.notes: ScenePulse POSTs here. Body = { event: 'artist.enrich', payload: { artistId, artistName, spotifyUrl }, sentAt }. Copy this node's Production URL into ScenePulse secret N8N_WEBHOOK_URL.

nodes.name: ⬇ BUILD YOUR FLOW HERE
nodes.notes:
Add your provider nodes between this node and the write-back nodes:
- Cyanite: paste Spotify URL -> audio tags (mood/energy/genre/bpm/key) -> feed 'Write Audio Analysis'.
- Musixmatch: fetch lyrics for artistName -> themes/keywords/sentiment -> feed 'Write Lyric Analysis'.
- Songstats / JamBase: optional, post to their own ScenePulse endpoints when ready.
artistId is available as {{ $('On Artist Enrich').item.json.body.payload.artistId }}.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ artistId: $('On Artist Enrich').item.json.body.payload.artistId, energy: null, danceability: null, valence: null, acousticness: null, instrumentalness: null, tempo: null, loudness: null, musicalKey: null, mode: null, genres: [], moods: [], source: 'cyanite' }) }}

nodes.name: Write Audio Analysis
nodes.notes: FIXED ScenePulse contract. Replace the null/[] placeholders with values mapped from your Cyanite node. Only artistId is required; everything else is optional. genres[] and moods[] auto-become discovery tags.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ artistId: $('On Artist Enrich').item.json.body.payload.artistId, themes: [], keywords: [], sentiment: null, sentimentScore: null, language: null, summary: null, source: 'musixmatch' }) }}

nodes.name: Write Lyric Analysis
nodes.notes: FIXED ScenePulse contract. Replace the null/[] placeholders with values mapped from your Musixmatch node. Only artistId is required. themes[] auto-become discovery tags.
